creator: okazaki@be.to
text:
This PR updates editors/emacs20-dl to emacs-dl-20.7.

	modified: Makefile files/md5 pkg/DESCR
	          patches/patch-ai patch-ca patch-cb
	                  patch-cc patch-cd patch-cg
	removed:  patches/patch-af patch-cf patch-ch

	* Makefile files/md5 pkg/DESCR: Updated Emacs version to 20.7. 

	* patches/patch-af (src/unexfreebsd.c): Removed.
	  Not used by the port.

	* patches/patch-ai (src/unexelf.c): Regenerated for emacs-20.7.
	* patches/patch-cg (src/process.c): Ditto.

	* patches/patch-ca (src/Makefile.in): 5-CURRENT's and 4-STABLE's
	  libtermcap -> libncurses symbolic link issues are now well
	  handled by vendor's src/s/freebsd.h.  Moved LIBS_XPG changes
	  to patch-cb.
	* patches/patch-cb (src/s/freebsd.h): Regenerate for emacs-20.7.
	  Update the conditional of enclosing the USE_XPG check so as
	  not to link libxpg4 on recently 5-CURRENT and 4-STABLE worlds
	  after the merge of libxpg4 into libc.  Added LIBS_XPG to
	  LIBS_SYSTEM.

	* patches/patch-cc (configure.in): Merged patch-ch.
	* patches/patch-ch (configure.in): Removed.

	* patches/patch-cd (src/config.in): Merged patch-cf.
	* patches/patch-cf (src/config.in): Removed.

Fix: 

The patch can be obtained from
  http://w3.mtci.ne.jp/~refactor/ports/emacs20-dl-20_7-update.diff.gz

  MD5 (emacs20-dl-20_7-update.diff.gz) = 6271e29192ad8141788af887b59895e6
